📋 Project Management & Kanban

Task boards, sprints, roadmaps and issue tracking — open source alternatives to Asana, Jira, Trello and Monday.

Tap any tool to see curated open source alternatives with honest strengths and weaknesses.

Project and task management for teams.

Work OS with flexible boards and automations.

Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Planka

Trello-style kanban you can self-host in minutes.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Wekan

Open source kanban with long self-hosted history.

License: MIT Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Focalboard

Open source Trello/Notion hybrid by Mattermost.

License: MIT / AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

OpenProject

Enterprise-ready open source project management.

License: GPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Plane

Open source JIRA alternative with cycles and modules.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Taiga

Agile project management with Scrum and Kanban.

License: Mozilla-2.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆

Kanboard

Minimalist PHP-based kanban project manager.

License: MIT Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆

Redmine

Classic Rails-based issue tracker used for decades.

License: GPL-2.0 Self-host: ★★★☆☆
OpenInstead — open source alternatives to the SaaS you already use. Updated April 2026.
Disclaimer: licensing, features and pricing change. Verify each tool's current status on its official site before committing.
